description:
Overview
Easy to carry
Healthy and eco-friendly
Flexible lock catch sealing design
Can be put in microwave oven for heating
Please open the lid or exhaust port before putting it in the microwave.

Specification
material: plastic
Shape: square
Whether to keep warm: No
Style A: blue 1100ml (two compartments) + plastic fork and spoon,
Style B: pink 1100ml (two compartments) + plastic fork and spoon,
Style C: Apricot 1100ml (two compartments) + plastic fork and spoon,
Style D: blue 1500ml (three grids) + plastic fork and spoon,
Style E: pink 1500ml (three grids) + plastic fork and spoon,
Style F: Apricot 1500ml (three grids) + plastic fork and spoon
Number of layers of box: single layer

Package Content
1*lunch box+1*fork+1*spoon
